Each text type maps to a generator model, with a default and per-type overrides, so demanding types can use stronger LLMs.
Generation supports assigning different existing models to different text types. Simple types use the default model; reasoning-heavy types (deferred) can be routed to stronger models.

Some text types, especially the deferred reasoning dialogues and logic documents, need higher-quality generators than plain prose. The configuration maps text type to model with a single default and optional overrides. The generator groups enabled types by their resolved model so each model loads once.
